message:
feat(scheduler): route local waiters to owner worker queue (bd-3oao9)

When a task completes, its waiters are now routed based on locality:
- Local waiters with pinned_worker go to owner's local_ready queue
- Local waiters without pinned_worker go to current worker's local_ready
- Global waiters still use the global injector

Adds all_local_ready field to ThreeLaneWorker for cross-worker routing,
wake_worker() to WorkerCoordinator for targeted wakeup, and 3 regression
tests. Also fixes ThreeLaneWaker test field name and once_cell type
annotation errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
